source_pr.title: statistics/handle: fix some unstable test cases
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.


There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #30822

Problem Summary:

```
make ut X='run statistics/handle'
```

Fix some failed test cases:

- TestInitStats
- TestShowGlobalStats
- TestIndexFMSketch
- TestFastAnalyzeColumnHistWithNullValue
- TestSingleSessionInsert
- TestUpdateErrorRate
- TestQueryFeedback
- TestQueryFeedbackForPartition
- TestUpdateStatsByLocalFeedback
- TestIndexQueryFeedback4TopN
- TestUnsignedFeedbackRanges

### What is changed and how it works?

Query feedback is not available under `tidb_analyze_version = 2`
and some behaviour also different under different `tidb_analyze_version`

Set the `tidb_analyze_version` variable  to make the test run indenpendly, for example:

```
make ut X='run statistics/handle TestIndexQueryFeedback4TopN'
```

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. This PR stabilizes it by: statistics/handle: fix some unstable test cases.
